Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20603 0 0}{f 5 21 1 105}Hmmm... This is certainly a fascinating forum...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 105}Hm? Are you interested in the dark web too...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 105}I collect information from various people about "interesting" sites and forums...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 105}If you want, I can sell you some info... Top secret stuff, even...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20602 0 0}{f 5 21 1 105}Heh, you're a curious one, aren't you...? Well, go on and take a look.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20604 0 0}{f 5 21 1 105}Thanks... I'll be on the search for more exquisite info...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 20605 0 0}{f 5 21 1 105}Sorry, I'm a little busy tonight... Come back some other time, won't ya?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You got guts, comin' to a place like this on your own...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Well, I'd be happy to sell you some info on... "unconventional" websites, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Do you have your own computer? You'll need one to make use of my services...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like I can get information[n]on unusual websites here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 0 1 2}If I can use a computer at the dorm{f 0 1 27}, I might[n]be able to look into these websites...[n]{f 1 1}
